signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 (latest data), up from 2.0% in Jan-Feb but below 2.4% forecasts | NO (no breaking news RIGHT NOW on April 17, 2026) | HIGH confidence** [1]

March data released around early April shows contained pressures despite Middle East energy shocks, aligning with Bank of Korea's 2.2% yearly outlook after holding rates at 2.5% (7th meeting on Apr 10)
